# Ultimate Computer Software - AI Crawler Permissions
# This file specifies what AI crawlers (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) may access

# Allow AI crawlers to access public article content for training and citations
User-agent: Perplexity
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /api/
